title: Green Blade BB-CW112 5 x 0.6m PVC Coated Galvanized Wire Netting with 25mm Mesh
features: PVC coated galvanised hexagonal wire netting
Ideal for fencing, plant protection and support, dog and child proofing gardens, chicken runs, animal enclosures
Net measures 5m length by 0.6m height by 25mm diameter hexagonal hole
description: Product Description Green Blade strong, durable and long lasting traditional ‘chicken wire’ fencing has a wide range of uses. It is manufactured from strong, galvanised, PVC coated hexagonal wire. Ideal for fencing, plant protection and support, dog and child proofing gardens, chicken runs, animal enclosures. Shrink wrapped with colour insert. Net measures 5m length by 0.6m height by 25mm diameter hexagonal hole. Green Blade offers a comprehensive range of garden tools and general garden maintenance products. Highly visible branded packaging. 12 month no quibble guarantee. If you’re a novice gardener or just keen to upgrade your outdated tools, Greenblade can help. Bringing together a huge choice of equipment, so that you will find all you need, from a hardwearing pair of Gloves to a Ratchet Tree Pruner or even a Garden Cart. Greenblade provide top quality garden tools that will take the strain out of even the hardest of tasks. Box Contains 1 x Piece
